svg.title: Appendix I hero: 8 reference architectures grid
svg.desc: Eight architecture profile cards arranged in a 4-by-2 grid (Small, Medium, Large, VDI on top row; Hybrid+NC2, ROBO, Greenfield, Compliance on bottom row), each showing node count silhouette, VM range, and target profile. Mono path top-left. Purple appendix accent. Sizer-disclaimer strip at the bottom.

g.text: NCI Pro · NCM Pro · Async DR
starting points · run Sizer for binding numbers · name the trade-offs
